description_for_human: Run governed read-only Snowflake analytics actions.
description_for_model: Use this plugin for approved Snowflake read-only analytics questions, governed dataset descriptions, and summary retrieval from curated schemas and views.

functions.name: run_readonly_snowflake_query
functions.description: Run a read-only Snowflake query against approved schemas and return summarized results.

question.description: Natural language analytics question to translate into a governed read-only query.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: describe_snowflake_dataset
functions.description: Describe an approved Snowflake table, view, or semantic object.

dataset_name.description: Name of the approved dataset or view.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

tools.name: run_readonly_snowflake_query
tools.description: Run a read-only Snowflake query against approved schemas and return summarized results.

question.description: Natural language analytics question to translate into a governed read-only query.

tools.name: describe_snowflake_dataset
tools.description: Describe an approved Snowflake table, view, or semantic object.

dataset_name.description: Name of the approved dataset or view.
